title: Alignment
pickOne: **Neutral** - Solve someone else's problem without getting emotionally invested.
**Evil** - Make a profit off of someone else's misery.

title: Race
pickOne: **Human** - When you kill a monster with the Large, Huge, Intelligent, or Terrifying tags, gain +1 Aim, but only once per kill.
**Dwarf** - When you make a sacrifice or put yourself in danger to save someone else, gain +1 Aim.
**Gnome** - When you seek out excitement despite the danger to yourself, gain +1 Aim.

title: This is my Boom-Stick!
description:
You own a unique firearm. Only you can use this gun; it will not function for anyone else.

Your gun has 2 weight, and the following tags: near, **ignores armor**, **loud** and **reload**.

Choose two upgrades for your gun:
pick: **Incendiary**: Add the **fiery** tag, and your shots can start fires
**Compact**: -1 weight, and your gun is small enough that you can conceal it on your person, though it will still be found if you are searched
**Bayonet**: You can **Hack and Slash** with your gun at a range of **close**, rolling with DEX instead of STR

title: Gunslinger's Oath
description: Choose up to three tenets of your personal code of honor:
pick: Always show courage in the face of danger.
Always avenge a slight or dishonor.
Always assist anyone in distress if it is within your power to do so.
Never accept a reward for any help that you give.

submoves.title: Aim
submoves.description: As long as you keep true to your oath, your gun will fire true for you. You begin play with 1 **Aim**. Your maximum **Aim** is equal to the number of tenets of your **Gunslinger's Oath**. If you break your oath, reduce your **Aim** to 0, and while you have 0 **Aim**, you take **-1 ongoing** to any rolls that involve using your gun.

title: Trick Shot (+Aim)
description: When you **go for an improbable shot with an unusual effect**, describe what you want to happen and roll+**Aim**.

outcomes.text: Choose one thing you have to do to pull off the shot:
bullets: Reduce your **Aim** by 1 (you may not choose this option if you have 0 **Aim**)
Spend some time lining up the shot

outcomes.text: Choose one, and the GM chooses one:

title: Big Damn Hero
description: When you **go above and beyond the call of duty to uphold your Gunslinger's Oath**, gain +1 **Aim**.

title: Gunsmith
description: Choose an additional upgrade for your gun

title: Listen Up, You Primitive Screw-heads!
description: When you **dramatically fire your gun into the air and spend 1 ammo**, you may **Parley** with +**Aim** instead of CHA.

title: Manhunter
description: Gain a non-multiclass move from the ranger playbook.

title: Mysterious Stranger
description: When you make the **Outstanding Warrants** move, you may have the results of your roll apply to one of the other players instead of yourself.

title: Quick Draw
description: You're never caught by surprise. When an enemy would get the drop on you, you get to act first instead. You can draw and fire your gun in the blink of an eye.

title: Scattershot
description: When you **Volley** with your gun, you may spend extra ammo before rolling. For each point of ammo spent you may choose an extra target. Roll once and apply damage to all targets.

title: Silver Bullets (+INT)
description: When you **have time and materials to fashion special bullets**, describe what kind of bullets you want to make and roll+INT.

outcomes.text: The GM chooses one from the list below.
bullets: You only get 1 ammo (otherwise, you get 3 ammo)
You'll need an additional material beyond what you have now
You need help or someone else's expertise to make it
The best you can do is a lesser version, unreliable and limited

outcomes.text: The GM chooses up to three.

title: Steady Hand
description:
Requires: **Trick Shot**

When you make a **Trick Shot**, on a 12+ you succeed beyond all expectation. Choose nothing from the list.

title: Thousand-Yard Stare (+CHA)
description: When you **fix someone with your cold, hard stare**, roll+CHA.

bullets: You learn something about their true nature. The GM will tell you what.

title: Bulletproof (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **take damage or suffer serious harm**, you may lower your **Aim** by 1 to prevent that damage or otherwise evade the harm. You may not use this move if you have 0 **Aim**.

title: Bullet Time (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Quick Draw**

When you **Defy Danger** with your quick reflexes you cannot get a 6-, treat that as a 7-9 result.

title: Bushwhacker (Requires level 6+)
description: Gain a non-multiclass move from the ranger playbook.

title: Dead Man's Trigger (Requires level 6+)
description: Nothing can make you drop your gun, but it can still be forcibly taken from you. When you are **reduced to zero HP**, you may immediately fire your gun one final time before you take your **Last Breath**, even if you have no ammo.

title: Eagle Eye (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **Discern Realities**, ask one additional question, even on a 6-, and add these options to the list of questions:

bullets: What is my best escape route?
Which of my allies is the most vulnerable?

title: The Face of My Father (Requires level 6+)
description: Your maximum **Aim** is increased by 1.

title: Long Shot (Requires level 6+)
description: Add **reach** and **far** to your gun's ranges. If your gun already has **far**, add **really far** instead.

title: More Dakka! (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **deal damage with your gun**, you may deal additional damage equal to your **Aim**. If you do, that gunshot is very, *very* loud.

title: Semper Fidelis (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Big Damn Hero**

When you **Defy Danger** while acting to uphold your **Gunslinger's Oath**, you cannot get a 6-, treat that as a 7-9 result.

title: Wanderlust (Requires level 6+)
description: You always know the way back to the nearest steading. When you act on this knowledge the GM will give you a choice of a long, safe path or a shorter, more dangerous path. When you arrive at your destination, if anything has changed since your last visit, you spot it right away.
